clues.clue: This mischievous pet monkey accompanies the street rat Aladdin.
This nervous Jamaican crab serves King Triton and sings 'Under the Sea.'
This small, fast-talking red dragon guards the heroine of 'Mulan.'
This curious raccoon is Pocahontas's woodland companion.
In 'Cinderella,' the helpful mice include Jaq and this plump one.
This big blue, wish-granting spirit bursts from a lamp in 'Aladdin.'
This carrot-nosed snowman from 'Frozen' dreams of summer and warm hugs.
A meerkat and a warthog teach 'Hakuna Matata' in 'The Lion King'; name the warthog.
This goat-legged trainer of heroes in 'Hercules' was voiced by Danny DeVito.
This uptight mantel-clock majordomo keeps order in the Beast's castle.
Snow White keeps house for this many diamond-mining dwarfs.
In 'Tangled,' Rapunzel's loyal companion is this color-changing reptile, Pascal.
In 'The Princess and the Frog,' a trumpet-loving bayou reptile named Louis is this toothy species.
In 'Moana,' the heroine is stuck at sea with this dim-witted clucking barnyard bird.
Sleeping Beauty is raised in the woods by three good ones of these magical winged women.
Ursula commands two slithering moray henchmen named Flotsam and Jetsam, of this slippery species.
Jafar's sarcastic, squawking sidekick is this red-feathered bird.
Scar's cackling trio includes Shenzi, Banzai and this nonspeaking, giggling one.
Captain Hook's bumbling, kindly first mate is this fellow.
Maleficent's clumsy foot-soldiers in 'Sleeping Beauty' are this pig-snouted horde.
In 'Toy Story,' the cowboy Woody's chief rival turned best friend is this space ranger.
In 'Finding Nemo,' this forgetful blue tang helps Marlin search for his son.
In 'Monsters, Inc.,' this short, one-eyed green monster is Sulley's wisecracking partner.
In 'Up,' this golden retriever wears a collar that lets him speak aloud.
In 'Ratatouille,' the rat Remy secretly steers this clumsy kitchen garbage boy by his hair.

final.clue: This late, beloved comedian improvised the manic Genie in Disney's 1992 'Aladdin.'
